allow: Bash(zsh -lic 'nvm use >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "try{const m=require\(\\"./app/generated/prisma/client\\"\);console.log\(\\"client OK keys:\\",Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,5\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(\\"path require failed:\\",e.code||e.message\)}; try{require\(\\"@prisma/adapter-pg\\"\);console.log\(\\"adapter-pg OK\\"\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(\\"adapter fail\\",e.code\)}; try{require\(\\"pg\\"\);console.log\(\\"pg OK\\"\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(\\"pg fail\\",e.code\)}"')
